name: Assault Blackwing - Kunai the Drizzle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アサルト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>霧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のクナイ
name_jp_rom: Asaruto Burakku Fezā - Kirisame no Kunai
name_jp_tl: Assault Black Feather - Kunai the Drizzle
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Blackwing" monster. If Summoned this way, this card is treated as a Tuner monster. Once per turn: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control, and declare a Level from 1 to 8; it becomes that Level until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Blackwing" monster. If Summoned this way, this card is treated as a Tuner monster. Once per turn: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control, and declare a Level from 1 to 8; it becomes that Level until the end of this turn.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Blackwing" monster. If Summoned this way, this card is treated as a Tuner monster. Once per turn: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control, and declare a Level from 1 to 8; it becomes that Level until the end of this turn.

stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
